description: Manage shared backend processes via the sharedserver CLI. SessionStart attaches; SessionEnd detaches.

hooks._comment_timeout: 300, not 30: on a first run bin/sharedserver may download a release (cold fetch + install), and under a concurrent-session install race it waits up to 20s for the lock before re-probing. 30s could kill the hook mid-install, which is the one moment a partial write does damage. Steady state is unaffected — the hook returns in well under a second once a binary exists.
